scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) with valid HTML and baseUri returns Document after lock parse release
scenarios.precondition: Stub TreeBuilder.parse(htmlReader, baseUri, parser) returns a predefined Document instance; using real StringReader; no mocking framework used
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the predefined instance from TreeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parseInput success String overload

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with valid Reader and baseUri returns Document after lock parse release
scenarios.precondition: Stub TreeBuilder.parse(reader, baseUri, parser) returns a predefined Document; uses StringReader; stub is hand-written simple fake
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the predefined instance from TreeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O2 parseInput success Reader overload

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) with null html throws NullPointerException before locking
parseInput(Reader, String) when TreeBuilder.parse throws UncheckedIOException unlocks and propagates exception
scenarios.precondition: Stub TreeBuilder.parse(reader, baseUri, parser) throws java.io.UncheckedIOException; stub behavior explicit
scenarios.expectedResult: throws UncheckedIOException; lock is released in finally
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parseInput reader overload IO-error
